---
id: get-pre-payment-option
title: "Retrieve Pre Payment Check response."
description: "This endpoint allows you to retrieve the pre payment options for specific user using tabby integrated API."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve Pre Payment Check response."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve Pre Payment Check response."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/checkout/api/sdk/v1/pre-payment-option-check/{session_id}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint allows you to retrieve the pre payment options for specific user using tabby integrated API.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"session_id","schema":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[-\\w]+$"},"required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"pg_code":{"type":"string","maxLength":50}},"required":["pg_code"],"title":"PGCodeValidation"}},"application/x-www-form-urlencoded":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"pg_code":{"type":"string","maxLength":50}},"required":["pg_code"],"title":"PGCodeValidation"}},"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"pg_code":{"type":"string","maxLength":50}},"required":["pg_code"],"title":"PGCodeValidation"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"is_available":{"type":"boolean","default":true}},"title":"TabbyPrePaymentCheck"},{"type":"object","properties":{"single_checkout_enabled":{"type":"boolean"},"is_available":{"type":"boolean"},"payment_labels":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"payment_type":{"type":"string"},"instalment":{"type":"integer"},"description_en":{"type":"string"},"description_ar":{"type":"string"}},"required":["description_ar","description_en","instalment","payment_type"],"title":"PaymentLabel"}}},"required":["is_available","payment_labels","single_checkout_enabled"],"title":"TamaraPrePaymentCheck"},{"type":"object","properties":{"is_available":{"type":"boolean","default":true}},"title":"TalyPrePaymentCheck"}],"title":"PrePaymentCheckResponses"}}},"description":""},"400":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"field_name":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","default":"This field is required."}}},"title":"FieldErrors"}}},"description":""},"403":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"detail":{"type":"string"}},"required":["detail"],"title":"GenericErrorMessage"}}},"description":""}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
